Actions.Text: REFERRED TO INVESTIGATIONS AND GOVERNMENT OPERATIONS

Title: Authorizes the town of Minisink to impose a hotel and motel tax
Summary: Authorizes the town of Minisink to impose a hotel and motel tax at a rate of five percent.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing the town of Minisink to impose a hotel and motel tax
